title: Evidence Record
description: A timestamped, structured record of a single policy check evaluation against a specific resource. The atomic unit of compliance evidence. Evidence records are immutable once written. Lives in 08-evidence/collected/.

$schema.description: Schema reference for editor tooling. Not validated against the schema itself.

id.description: UUID v4 generated at collection time. Globally unique.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema used to produce the record. Enables forward-compatible parsing.

repository.description: The repository this evidence was collected from.

commit_sha.description: Full 40-character SHA of the Git commit evaluated. Evidence is commit-bound.

control_id.description: The platform control this evidence addresses.

policy_check_id.description: Required for automated evidence. The policy check that produced this record.

profile_version.description: Version of the declared compliance profile at collection time (e.g., '1.0.0'). Creates a stable reference for what controls were in scope.

control_catalog_version.description: Git tag or SHA of platform-compliance at collection time. Identifies the exact version of the control definition used.

policy_bundle_version.description: Version of the policy bundle (07-policies/) used for this evaluation. May be a git tag or a content hash.

workflow_run_id.description: GitHub Actions workflow run ID or equivalent CI run identifier. Links evidence to the exact CI execution.

evaluated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone when the policy check was evaluated.

result.description: pass: control satisfied. fail: control not satisfied. manual_review: requires human review; automated check cannot determine result. not_applicable: scope condition evaluated false. waived: failing but covered by an active approved waiver. error: policy check encountered an error; result is indeterminate.

artifact_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the collected evidence payload (the 'details' field and any attached artifacts). Provides tamper-evidence for the evidence record itself. Format: sha256:{hex}.

details.description: Structured payload from the policy check. Contents are policy-specific. Included in the artifact_hash computation.

waiver_id.description: Required when result is waived. References the active waiver record in 09-assessments/waivers/.

attestor.description: Required for manual or manual_review evidence. The identity of the person who attested.

collection_method.description: Required for manual evidence. How the evidence was collected.

collected_by.description: Identifies what produced this evidence record.
